name: Cauliflower & Potatoes with Black Mustard See
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Powdered hot red chile powder
1 tablespoon Lemon juice, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel potatoes and cut into 1/2-inch cubes. Place in a bowl of water.
2. Separate cauliflower into florets about the same size as the potato cubes. Set aside.
3. Mix mustard seeds with fenugreek seeds in a small bowl.
4. Mix ground spices (cumin, turmeric, powdered hot red chile powder, and salt) together in another small bowl.
5. Heat oil in a pan until very hot. Add whole seeds all at once, keeping face away from the pan.
6. As mustard seeds turn gray, lower heat to medium and add ground spices.
7. Cook for 1-2 seconds, then stir in garlic.
8. Add chopped tomato and green chiles. Cook for about 5 minutes.
9. Drain potatoes and add them to the pan with the cauliflower.
10. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring to coat vegetables with spices.
11. Add half a cup water and half a cup cilantro. Cover and simmer until vegetables are tender.
12. Check water level frequently and add more as needed.
13. Taste for salt, add lemon juice if desired, stir well, and serve garnished with remaining cilantro.
